information.name: measurements
information.descriptionLong: REST endpoint to interact with Cumulocity measurements

endpoints.name: getMeasurementCollection
endpoints.description: Get a collection of measurements based on filter parameters
endpoints.descriptionLong: Get a collection of measurements based on filter parameters

powershell:
Get a list of measurements
Get-MeasurementCollection
go:
Get a list of measurements
c8y measurement get

headerParameters.name: csv
headerParameters.description: Results will be displayed in csv format

headerParameters.name: excel
headerParameters.description: Results will be displayed in Excel format

headerParameters.name: unit
headerParameters.description: Every measurement fragment which contains 'unit' property will be transformed to use required system of units.

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of measurement occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of measurement occurrence.

queryParameters.name: revert
queryParameters.description: Return the newest instead of the oldest measurements. Must be used with dateFrom and dateTo parameters

endpoints.name: getMeasurementSeries
endpoints.description: Get a collection of measurements based on filter parameters
endpoints.descriptionLong: Get a collection of measurements based on filter parameters

powershell:
Get a list of measurements
Get-MeasurementCollection
go:
Get a list of measurements
c8y measurement get

Get a list of series [nx_WEA_29_Delta.MDL10FG001] and [nx_WEA_29_Delta.ST9] for device 12345
measurement getSeries --source 12345 --series nx_WEA_29_Delta.MDL10FG001 --series nx_WEA_29_Delta.ST9 --dateFrom (Get-C8yDate (last 10min)) --dateTo (Get-C8yDate (last 0min))

queryParameters.name: series
queryParameters.description: measurement type and series name, e.g. c8y_AccelerationMeasurement.acceleration

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of measurement occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of measurement occurrence.

body.name: source
body.description: The ManagedObject which is the source of this measurement.

body.name: type
body.description: The most specific type of this entire measurement.

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of measurement occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of measurement occurrence.
